title: Prima Pack of 6 Stainless Steel Corn Skewers Mini Corn On The Cob Holder BBQ Picnic Snack Fork (18547C)
features: This pack of practical corn on the cob skewers are a great way to enjoy your corn without getting your hands burnt and keeping them clean too, making your barbecue and dining experience more enjoyable and convenient.

Each mini corn skewer is designed to use with ease and constructed with a durable stainless steel double prong which glides into the food more easily. The double prong prevents corn from rotating and holds other foods firmly in place so you can sit back and enjoy your meal.

These stainless steel corn holders with plastic handle have a wide range of applications, perfect for corn on the cob, fruit chunks, meats, cheese and salads and much more. They are great for family picnics, barbecues, home grilling, outdoor dining, camping and many other occasions.
description: Pack of 6 corn skewers. This pack of practical corn on the cob skewers are a great way to enjoy your corn without getting your hands burnt and keeping them clean too, making your barbecue and dining experience more enjoyable and convenient. Each mini corn skewer is designed to use with ease and constructed with a durable stainless steel double prong which glides into the food more easily. The double prong prevents corn from rotating and holds other foods firmly in place so you can sit back and enjoyyour meal. These stainless steel corn holders with plastic handle have a wide range of applications, perfect for corn on the cob, fruit chunks, meats, cheese and salads and much more. They are great for family picnics, barbecues, home grilling, outdoor dining, camping and many other occasions. Each skewer measures approximately 8.5cm in length, including the corn handle. The prongs alone measure 2.3cm approximately. Hand washing advised.
